intro.title: Hello, I'm ztstc
intro.desc:
Robot development & embedded systems enthusiast, sophomore at HDU, currently at RAS-IRU Robotics Lab
Specializing in IoT and robotics hardware/software project solutions
Email: lhctuotuo@126.com

item1.title: RAS-IRU Knowledge Base
item1.desc: A knowledge base built for robotics beginners, covering ROS/ROS2, SLAM navigation, and robotics software/hardware development. Continuously updated.

item2.title: Nailoong Bot "Milk Dragon Robot"
item2.desc: Two-wheel differential chassis robot project with full-stack development: mechanical design, chassis driver board, embedded software, ROS/ROS2 drivers, SLAM navigation, and emotional companion AI Agent.

item3.title: FOC_WL: ESP32S3-based 2804 Micro Brushless Motor Driver
item3.desc: FOC brushless motor project using ESP32S3+MP6540+MT6701. Supports Type-C PD power, temperature and current sensing. Hardware complete, driver tuning in progress.

item4.title: IoT PC Performance Dashboard (Waveshare ESP32P4 86 Box)
item4.desc: IoT project using ESP32P4 driving a 4-inch LCD touchscreen, connects to PC monitoring app via TCP. Real-time CPU/GPU/memory stats, touch interaction to switch time, weather, and more.

item5.title: BerryAI: Smart Strawberry Cultivation System
item5.desc: For strawberry cultivation: 3 generations of soil-environment sensors, 1 micro water-fertilizer integration device, and a low-frame-rate greenhouse camera. All hardware based on ESP32 series. Open-source includes hardware and backend server (excluding the AI Agent part).

project1.title: RAS-IRU Knowledge Base
project1.desc: A knowledge base built for robotics beginners, covering ROS/ROS2, SLAM navigation, and robotics software/hardware development. Continuously updated.

project2.title: Nailoong Bot "Milk Dragon Robot"
project2.desc: Two-wheel differential chassis robot project with full-stack development: mechanical design, chassis driver board, embedded software, ROS/ROS2 drivers, SLAM navigation, and emotional companion AI Agent.

project3.title: FOC_WL: ESP32S3-based 2804 Micro Brushless Motor Driver
project3.desc: FOC brushless motor project using ESP32S3+MP6540+MT6701. Supports Type-C PD power, temperature and current sensing. Hardware complete, driver tuning in progress.

project4.desc: IoT project using ESP32P4 driving a 4-inch LCD touchscreen, connects to PC monitoring app via TCP. Real-time CPU/GPU/memory stats, touch interaction to switch time, weather, and more.

item1.title: BRS Parallel Quadruped Robot
item1.desc: Project 'BLACK☆ROCK SHOOTER': A full-stack parallel structure quadruped robot. The complete solution is open-source and competed in the 2025 ROBOCON National Competition.

item2.title: SliverWolf Desktop Quadruped
item2.desc: A direct-drive, position-controlled serial quadruped using 9g micro servos. Features IMU integration, voice control, various gaits, and collaborative fetching with a robotic arm.

item3.title: BionicLobster ROV
item3.desc: Open-source bionic Boston Lobster submersible robot project, including the control system, vector propulsion model, and hardware design for a buoyancy-controllable multi-DOF underwater robot.

item4.title: ROBOCON 2024 R1 Robot
item4.desc: Low-level control repository for the ROBOCON 2024 R1 robot, including mechanical schemes, omnidirectional chassis kinematics, and task mechanism logic.

item5.title: 3508 Legged Robot Drive Platform
item5.desc: A quadruped robot drive solution based on DJI 3508 brushless geared motors, used in multiple ROBOCON National Competitions from 2022 to 2025.

item6.title: HTDW4438 HIMloco
item6.desc: HIMloco locomotion control and deployment project for HTDW4438, covering policy transfer and real-robot validation workflows.

item7.title: HTDW4438 OpenDog Deployment
item7.desc: Physical control and deployment code for the HTDW4438 robot, including mechanical design, control algorithm implementation, and system integration testing.

item8.title: ROBOCON2024-PPS
item8.desc: Code repository for the ROBOCON 2024 PPS-related robot project, including competition task logic and control implementations.

item9.title: LocoWiki
item9.desc: A lightweight open-source wiki and knowledge management project focused on structured note organization, fast retrieval, and long-term knowledge growth.

event1.title: Joined HDU RAS-IRU Robotics Lab
event1.desc: Started learning ROS and participating in the lab’s robotics project development and maintenance work.

event3.title: Vice Minister of the Media & News Department, Student Union, Hangzhou Dianzi University Shengguangji College
event3.desc: Organized and participated in filming and recording of multiple college events; contributed to public WeChat article writing.

event4.title: Gold Award, 15th Zhejiang Province “Challenge Cup” Extracurricular Academic Sci-Tech Works Competition
event4.desc: As a core member of the “Strawberry Twice” team, designed and developed the IoT sensors, cameras, and water-fertilizer integrated equipment for a strawberry-cultivation intelligent monitoring system.

event5.title: Gold Award, Zhejiang Province International College Students Innovation Competition (2025)
event5.desc: As a member of the “Strawberry Twice” team, designed and developed the IoT sensors, cameras, and water-fertilizer integrated equipment for a strawberry-cultivation intelligent monitoring system.

event7.title: Second Prize, 4th Robotics Challenge of HDU-ITMO (Mapping & Navigation Speed Race)
event7.desc: As team captain, led the development and integration of the car’s chassis design, drive, mapping, and vision modules.

event9.title: Silver Award, 15th Zhejiang Province “Challenge Cup” College Students Entrepreneurship Plan Competition
event9.desc: As a core member of the “Weilin Technology” team, participated in on-site Q&A; the project (intelligent forestry-painting inspection robot) was exhibited and recognized.
